question: 🎓 Will I complete my PhD?
reason: PhD completion rates are around 50-60%, and balancing research with employment can impact completion.
evidence: Balancing research with employment can impact completion rates.
A study found that 12.9% fewer students who pivoted disciplines graduated.
A review identified factors like student-advisor relationship and mentorship affecting completion rates.
searchQueries: PhD completion rates and factors affecting PhD completion 2026
raw: {"yes_probability": 0.55, "confidence": "medium", "short_reason": "PhD completion rates are around 50-60%, and balancing research with employment can impact completion.", "key_evidence": ["PhD completion rates are approximately 50-60%.", "Balancing research with employment can impact completion rates.", "A study found that 12.9% fewer students who pivoted disciplines graduated.", "A review identified factors like student-advisor relationship and mentorship affecting completion rates."], "source_urls": ["https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/feduc.2026.1794620/full", "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6355122/", "https://www.nber.org/digest/dec18/why-are-stem-doctoral-completion-rates-lower-women"]}
